headline: IQVIA’s Q1 Earnings Call: Our Top 5 Analyst Questions
summary: IQVIA’s first quarter results were positively received by the market, reflecting stronger-than-expected revenue growth and solid execution in both its Commercial and R&D Solutions segments. Management attributed this outperformance to increased client demand across core offerings, particularly in areas integrating artificial intelligence and analytics. headline: Will IQVIA's (IQV) AI‑Driven Biosimilar Partnership with Kexing Reshape Its Long‑Term Narrative?
summary: Earlier this week, IQVIA Holdings announced an expanded collaboration with Kexing Biopharm to support a global, multi-product biosimilar development and commercialization program using its AI-enabled clinical trial capabilities across design, site selection and execution. This partnership highlights how IQVIA is using integrated data, analytics and clinical expertise to help biopharma clients execute complex international biosimilar strategies under a single coordinated framework. Next,...
